task_objective: Ensure BrowserView cleanup disposes both the normalized nested view and parent owner wrapper when present.
design_decisions: Kept the change scoped to BrowserView cleanup behavior in src/index.tsx.
Removed the exclusive destroy branch so a nested BrowserView Destroy call no longer prevents parent owner disposal.
Used SteamClient.BrowserView.Destroy as a fallback when no direct owner Destroy method is available.
Preserved existing module cleanup by nulling autoSyncStatusBrowserView and autoSyncStatusBrowserViewOwner in finally.
results: Added a failing static regression first, updated destroyAutoSyncStatusBrowserView, and prepared the change for validation.
